effect.hazennstuff.archer_set_bonus.desc: By wearing the full set of the archer armor, you gain an increase of movement speed by 15% and increase of arrow draw speed and velocity by 10%.
effect.hazennstuff.chaos_state.descripti: Your body are in a chaotic state, wait until they stabilize before teleporting once more...
effect.hazennstuff.cooldown_reset.descri: Resets the cooldown of all of your spells.
effect.hazennstuff.dryads_blessing.descr: Blessed by the Dryad, your defence increases as you recieve more healing and enable overheal.
effect.hazennstuff.electrocuted.descript: Your life zaps away at your health.
effect.hazennstuff.fireblossom_ruler.des: Reign over the lands as your cast movement speed increases by 15% and spell resist increases by 10%.
effect.hazennstuff.fireblossom_warrior.d: Blaze through your foes as your defence and armor toughness increases by 2 and shred through protection by 15%.
effect.hazennstuff.flame_kissed.descript: Your body has been flame-kissed by the flamebearers. Your fire spell power and damage increases.
effect.hazennstuff.hexed.description: You wither away with each spell cast...
effect.hazennstuff.ichor.description: ''Eww...'' Reduces your defence and spell resistance.
effect.hazennstuff.infested.description: The spores grow within your body...
effect.hazennstuff.ionic_awakening.descr: Resets the cooldown of all of your spells.
effect.hazennstuff.mage_set_bonus.descri: By wearing the full set of the mage armor, you gain an increase of cast movement speed by 15% and increase of spell resistance by 10%.
effect.hazennstuff.mana_sickness.descrip: You feel the disconnect with the link with your arcana and soul...
effect.hazennstuff.spores.description: You wither away as the spores in your body sap away at your health.
effect.hazennstuff.summoner_set_bonus.de: By wearing the full set of the summoner armor, you gain an increase of summon damage by 15% and increase mana steal by 10%.
effect.hazennstuff.swordmaster_set_bonus: By wearing the full set of the swordmaster armor, you gain an increase of attack speed by 15% and increase protection shred by 10%.
effect.hazennstuff.tyrants_grace.descrip: Recieve the Flamebearer's Tyrannical enhancement, increases your attack speed and damage by 1, and your cast movement speed by 20% and fire spellpower by 12%.
entity.hazennstuff.aegis: Aegis: The Prefect of the Flamebearer
entity.hazennstuff.aptos: Aptos: The Legate of the Flamebearer
entity.hazennstuff.pyromus: Pyromus: The Tribune of the Flamebearer
item.hazennstuff.abberant_predator.descr: This armor set is dedicated to Ill9ustratedSky.
item.hazennstuff.atlas.description: This is a dedicated armor set for FoxeLocklear.
item.hazennstuff.blade_of_the_legate.des: A symbol, showing the rank of the legate...
item.hazennstuff.calamitas.description: A Calamity Mod Reference. This armor set resonates well with the scroll-forge...
item.hazennstuff.cat.description: This is dedicated to a good friend of mine, Catherine
item.hazennstuff.charred_bones.guide: Kill Wither Skeletons to obtain Charred Bones.
item.hazennstuff.chlorophyte_headgear.de: A Terraria reference. Bear this helmet to increase your affinity with magic.
item.hazennstuff.chlorophyte_helmet.desc: A Terraria reference. Bear this helmet to increase your accuracy with your archery.
item.hazennstuff.chlorophyte_mask.descri: A Terraria reference. Bear this mask to increase your sword mastery.
item.hazennstuff.cloth_of_the_flamebeare: Some echos still hold some remains of the flamebearer...
item.hazennstuff.dark_ritual_templar.des: Discern the Eldritch... This armor set is dedicated for Ace_The_Eldritch_King.
item.hazennstuff.energized_core_spellboo: This core resonates more than just electricity...
item.hazennstuff.fireblossom_battlemage_: Dawning the Fireblossom Crown improves your affinity with magic. This armor set is dedicated to MtheNinja.
Dawning the Battlemage Helmet improves your sword mastery. This armor set is dedicated to MtheNinja.
item.hazennstuff.fireblossom_crown.descr: Dawning the Fireblossom Crown improves your affinity with magic. This armor set is dedicated to MtheNinja.
item.hazennstuff.fireblossom_helmet.desc: Dawning the Battlemage Helmet improves your sword mastery. This armor set is dedicated to MtheNinja.
item.hazennstuff.frieren.description: A reference to the anime 'Frieren: Beyond Journey's End'.
item.hazennstuff.galvanized_sheath.desc: Upon hit, strike down your foes with a line of lightning.
item.hazennstuff.galvanized_sheath.guide: Smite your foes with a line of lightning.
item.hazennstuff.glowing_mushroom.guide: Combine glow ink sacs with mushrooms to make glowing mushrooms.
item.hazennstuff.golden_shower_spellbook: A Terraria Reference. This spellbook resonates well with the scroll-forge...
item.hazennstuff.ionic_splitter_ignition: The Ionic Ignition has awakened the Ionic Splitter from its dormancy...
item.hazennstuff.iron431.description: An armor set dedicated to Iron431, a creator of Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks.
item.hazennstuff.legionnaire_curios.desc: This curio seems to resonate with a certain spell...
item.hazennstuff.lemon_god.description: An armor set dedicated to My401k.
item.hazennstuff.miku.description: This is a reference to Hatsune Miku.
item.hazennstuff.mothic_witch.descriptio: This armor set is dedicated to Moth.
item.hazennstuff.nights_edge.description: A Terraria Reference. Dawn the power of the Night's Edge. This weapon resonates well with the scroll-forge...
item.hazennstuff.overgrown_bone.guide: Kill Boggeds to obtain Overgrown Bones.
item.hazennstuff.ravens_bane.description: Bare the weapon of a great infernal mage. This weapon resonates well with the scroll-forge...
item.hazennstuff.raw_zenalite.guide: It lies dormant... the touch of a god or the warmth of a star may awaken this mineral...
item.hazennstuff.rod_of_discord.descript: A Terraria Reference. This wand resonates well with the scroll-forge...
item.hazennstuff.rod_of_harmony.descript: A Terraria Reference. This scepter resonates well with the scroll-forge...
item.hazennstuff.sacred_robes.descriptio: An armor set dedicated to Smalls, a creator of Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks.
item.hazennstuff.scroll_sheath.desc: Upon hit, inflict mana sickness on your foes and reset your cooldown.
item.hazennstuff.shadow_scale.guide: Kill Phantoms to obtain Shadow Scales.
item.hazennstuff.skyscorcher.description: The sky scorching axe, forged from the mace from the Trial Chambers. Works the same as a mace.
item.hazennstuff.soulcalling_scepter.des: This staff holds immense power granted from the flambearer onto their subjects... this scepter resonates well with a certain flaming spell...
item.hazennstuff.teto.description: This is a reference to Kasane Teto.
item.hazennstuff.the_prefects_ring.desc: A prized posession, showing the rank of the prefect...
A medallion, showing the rank of the tribune...
item.hazennstuff.true_nights_edge.descri: A Terraria Reference. Unleash the power of the True Night's Edge. This weapon resonates well with the scroll-forge...
item.hazennstuff.tyros.description: Bear the garments of the first flambearer...
item.hazennstuff.vampire_knives.descript: A Terraria Reference. Right-Click to throw knives.
item.irons_spellbooks.chained_book.guide: The Flamebearer keeps their secrets to the other schools in here...
rarity.hazennstuff_rarity_blood.name: Sanguine
rarity.hazennstuff_rarity_cosmic.name: Cosmic
rarity.hazennstuff_rarity_deus.name: Enlightened
rarity.hazennstuff_rarity_eldritch.name: Esoteric
rarity.hazennstuff_rarity_ender.name: Enderconic
rarity.hazennstuff_rarity_evocation.name: Artificial
rarity.hazennstuff_rarity_fire.name: Flame-Kissed
rarity.hazennstuff_rarity_holy.name: Divine
rarity.hazennstuff_rarity_ice.name: Frostbitten
rarity.hazennstuff_rarity_lightning.name: Ionized
rarity.hazennstuff_rarity_nature.name: Blossomed
rarity.hazennstuff_rarity_radiance.name: Radiant
rarity.hazennstuff_rarity_shadow.name: Shadowed
spell.hazennstuff.brimstone_hellblast.gu: A Calamity Mod Reference ''The Brimstone Witch's signiture spell. Cast upon your foes a skull engulfed in brimstone flames, scaling off of the power of fire and blood, and leave your foes in ashes.''
spell.hazennstuff.call_forth_terraprisma: A Terraria Reference. Call forth Terraprismas that will attack and defend you. These fierce swords were the unrefined version of Summoned Swords once casted by the most pure entity in the Hallowed...
spell.hazennstuff.chaotic_teleport.guide: A Terraria Reference ''A low cool down teleporting spell that the prismatic elementals have mastered. Unfortunately, due to your untuned vessel, each teleport puts you into a state of chaos. You must wait for your body to stabilize or else your vessel will start to crack...''
spell.hazennstuff.cinderous_step.guide: Step into your destination in a flaring way. The souls of the many flamebearers engulf your body in flames, making you flame-kissed, your hands burning everything you touch, and your flames that you cast burning hotter than the stars.
spell.hazennstuff.counterspell_spider_li: Return your opponent's spells back to the soil of the earth.
spell.hazennstuff.crystal_volley.guide: An avalanche of arrows, piercing your enemies and leaving nothing but the hail and fallen foes.
spell.hazennstuff.death_sentence.guide: A Honkai Star-Rail Reference ''That paradise may be unreachable for me... Savor it in my place''
spell.hazennstuff.energy_burst.guide: A Calamity Fables Reference ''Fire a burst of electrifying energy balls, leaving your enemies shocked.''
spell.hazennstuff.fiery_dagger.guide: A spell lost to time... conjure fiery daggers and unleash hell upon your opponents as you send a barrage of daggers at them... the flames seem to burn hotter when casting with certain equipment...
spell.hazennstuff.golden_shower.descript: A Terraria Reference. This spellbook resonates well with the scroll-forge...
spell.hazennstuff.golden_shower.guide: A Terraria Reference ''Sprays a shower of ichor. Decreases target's defense''
spell.hazennstuff.hailstorm.guide: Watch as your foes crumble under the weight of ice chunks that rain from the skies.
spell.hazennstuff.ice_arrow.guide: Draw an arrow upon your foe and leave them pierced with an arrow of permafrost.
spell.hazennstuff.ionic_slash.guide: Unleash an electric slash that can smite down your foes. Such slash has the power and electricity to allow ignition for some artifacts... This spell resonates well with a dormant weapon...
spell.hazennstuff.nights_edge_strike.gui: A Terraria Reference ''Strike your foes with the strike of the Night's Edge.''
spell.hazennstuff.parry.guide: A ULTRAKILL Reference. ''Parry this you filthy casual. Parries a projectile with mana coursing through your left hand.''
spell.hazennstuff.reign_of_tyros.guide: Call forth the legion once commanded by Tyros, the ancient flamebearer that sought to seek immortality. This spell evolves the more artifacts you bear that were once dawned on the legionnaires...
spell.hazennstuff.scorching_slash.guide: The eternal flames burn brightly. Weild the blade ingulfed in flames and reduce your foes to nothing but ashes. This flame burns brighter than 10 stars to sever the threads of mana and arcana.
spell.hazennstuff.shard_sword.guide: A Honkai Star-Rail Reference. May your blade pierce through your foes...
spell.hazennstuff.shooting_star.guide: A Terraria Reference. A cosmetic version of Magic Missile
spell.hazennstuff.soul_seekers.guide: The reapers have come to claim the souls of your foes. Cast upon the 3 heads of the Soul Seekers to nullify your opponent's magic.
spell.hazennstuff.spectral_axe.guide: Throw a spectral axe, imbued with arcane magic, and strike down your foes.
spell.hazennstuff.syringe_barrage.guide: A Calamity Fables Reference ''Landing all 3 shots infects the target. Infected enemies erupt into mana-rich mushrooms on death, spreading the infection to nearby monsters.''
spell.hazennstuff.terraprismic_barrage.g: A Terraria Reference. Command a barrage of Terraprismas, homing in on where you command them to go and piercing through your enemies.
spell.hazennstuff.thorn_chakram.guide: A Terraria Reference ''Throw the Thorn Chakram at your foes and watch as it ricochets from the walls and your enemies.''
ui.hazennstuff.armor_resonation: This spell requires a certain armor set to be crafted...
ui.hazennstuff.item_resonation: This spell requires a certain item to be crafted...
ui.hazennstuff.material_resonation: This spell requires a certain material to be crafted...
ui.hazennstuff.staff_resonation: This spell requires a certain staff to be crafted...
ui.hazennstuff.weapon_resonation: This spell requires a certain weapon to be crafted...
